top_classes.name: Gray/dark brown extremely stoney coarse sandy
Dark reddish brown, organic-rich, silty loam
Bonner Co., Id. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Lake Co., Co. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Howard Co., Md. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Yancey Co., NC. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Nez Perce Co., Id. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Humboldt Co., Nv. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Pale brown silty loam (medial, typic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.fragiboralf.coarse.86P1994.spectrum.txt

Dark grayish brown and very dark brown extremely stoney coarse sandy loam (loamy skeletal, mixed, pergelic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.inceptisol.cryumbrept.coarse.87P3855.spectrum.txt

The parent material is schist and phyllite. Dark yellowish brown micaceous loam (coarse-loamy, micaceous, mesic typic), from piedmonts. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.inceptisol.dystrochrept.coarse.88P2535.spectrum.txt

Brown sandy loam (coarse-loamy over sandy-skeletal, mixed, mesic fluventic). 4.85% organic carbon, 9.9% clay, 14.2% silt, 75.9% sand. Clay mineralogy: small mica peakand weak vermiculite, kaolinite, and goethite peaks. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.inceptisol.haplumbrept.coarse.88P4699.spectrum.txt

Parent material is loess from mixed material. Dark grayish brown silty loam, (fine, montmorillonitic, mesic xeric). Physiography: upland slope in plateaus or tablelands. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.agialboll.coarse.85P5339.spectrum.txt
Gray silty clay, (fine, montmorillonitic, mesic cumulic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.haplaquoll.coarse.86P4603.spectrum.txt

Parent material: volcanic ash from acidic-ash material over glacial till from mixed-igneous and metamorphic matter. Physiography: hillside with 18 east-facing slope. Dark reddish brown, organic-rich, silty loam (A0 horizon), (medial over loamy, mixed typic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.spodosol.cryohumod.coarse.87P4264.spectrum.txt
